description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features multiple rooms, each with distinct flooring colors visible from above, and large glass windows and doors along the front and rear facades. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a small front garden, and a spacious backyard with a grassy area. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, contrasting with the darker fencing and driveway. The layout is open, with clear separations between living, sleeping, and utility areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring landscaped greenery and a driveway. The layout is open and visually distinct, with clear room divisions and a spacious backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, fenced perimeter, and multiple rooms with visible colored flooring.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large glass windows, and open grassy area with minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and additional trees along the fence line.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
